ops.text: window_fit evidence has an off-by-one at the window's inclusive end: on the warm-beachy demo run, a journey departing 7/15 against preferences.outbound_departure_window {start: 2026-07-14, end: 2026-07-16} produced fit evidence "Departs 7/15, 1 day(s) past your 7/14–7/16 window" (and a 7/19 departure read "5 day(s) past", which measures from the window START, not its end — should be 3). Both surfaced verbatim in assess verdicts and would have shipped onto a board. Likely home: the window-delta math in cli/getaway/fit.py.
